scripts.dev:all: powershell -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList '/c','npm run dev:tour-app' -WorkingDirectory '.'; Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList '/c','npm run dev:dashboard' -WorkingDirectory '.'"
scripts.build: npm --workspace @tour-show/tour-app run build && npm --workspace @tour-show/dashboard run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace @tour-show/tour-app run lint && npm --workspace @tour-show/dashboard run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @tour-show/tour-app run typecheck && npm --workspace @tour-show/dashboard run typecheck
